violations.text: Various items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels (missing full breakdown of ingredients). Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC moved items to behind the counter - no longer self service. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the front area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced soap. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The hand-washing sink in the front area was lacking paper towels. PIC brough out paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Scrubby pad was observed in the hand-washing sink in the front area. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed item. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC added extra sanitizer tablets. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC discarded ice and washed/sanitized machine during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Chicken was portioned out and placed tightly together hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep with a tight fitting lid. PIC placed items out on sheet pan in the walk-in cooler for active cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Various items packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Inspector observed a fly zapper on a shelf above food prep unit and a fly zapper racket on top of items under food prep table. PIC removed items. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The presence of small flies and rodents are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies and rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC called for service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The presence of small flies and rodents are not controlled as evidenced by live small flies and rodent droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PIC called for service during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed and placed items in 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
Inspector observed several boxes of single-service items stored on the floor in the kitchen area and front area. Items must be at least 6 inches off the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris:- prep units (food debris),- refrigeration units (food debris),- shelves under prep tables (old foil and droppings)- wire shelves (dust accumulation)- 1 door cooler unit (original wrapping) New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The following was observed in poor repair:- 3 bay faucet (leaking and lacking cold water),- food prep faucet (leaking),- drip under 3 bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025
Food prep sink was observed with an air break rather than an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

The floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/29/2025
The ceiling in the mop sink area is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2025

Various food product packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

Inspector observed fly glue trap hanging in the kitchen area.The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies.PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024

The ceiling and wall in the (kitchen) area is in poor repair. Observed missing ceiling tiles and a hole in wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Protective shielding is not provided for the lights in the (kitchen) area. Light bulbs must be shielded, coated, or otherwise shatter-resistant in areas where there is exposed food; clean equipment, utensils, and linens; or unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 08/08/2024
